name: valorae-proxy
description: Valorae Proxy v21.11.9 com API Routes consolidadas em uma function catch-all, app único, métricas ao vivo e Engine aprimorado para Vercel Free.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const roots=['api','routes','lib','test','scripts'];const files=[];function walk(d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(p.endsWith('.js'))files.push(p)}}roots.forEach(r=>fs.existsSync(r)&&walk(r));const cp=require('child_process');for(const f of files){cp.execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',f],{stdio:'inherit'})}console.log('Checked '+files.length+' JS files')"
scripts.test: node test/golden.test.js && node test/routes-audit.test.js && node test/scraper-gap.test.js && node test/scraper-supremacy.test.js && node test/v21-5-professional-refinement.test.js && node test/v21-5-1-audit-hardening.test.js && node test/v21-5-2-router-contract.test.js && node test/v21-5-3-scraper-compat-hardening.test.js && node test/v21-5-4-audit-corrections.test.js && node test/v21-5-5-complete-audit-hardening.test.js && node test/v21-5-6-final-review-hardening.test.js && node test/v21-5-7-contract-safety-hardening.test.js && node test/v21-5-8-portfolio-tech-supremacy.test.js && node test/v21-5-9-source-reliability-portfolio.test.js && node test/v21-5-10-launch-readiness.test.js && node test/v21-5-11-final-minute-audit.test.js && node test/v21-5-12-quality-matrix-portfolio-confidence.test.js && node test/v21-5-13-mature-final-release.test.js && node test/scrape-html-cache-key.test.js && node test/scrape-result-cache.test.js && node test/scrape-input-signature.test.js && node test/batch-fetch-grouping.test.js && node test/batch-result-cache.test.js && node test/fast-selectors.test.js && node test/scrape-metrics.test.js && node test/payload-fields-compact.test.js && node test/inflight-dedupe.test.js && node test/extraction-precision-v21-11-0.test.js && node test/engine-core-modules-v21-11-1.test.js && node test/engine-performance-precision-v21-11-2.test.js
